shared_properties: Keeps the same 32x32 pulsing light core dimensions as the fixed source.
Uses the same amber-to-white hazard palette and centered beam origin.
Preserves the same six-frame pulse rhythm so both source types feel related.
differences: Adds a hanging rail bracket and motion indicator fins to communicate movement.
The casing is slightly heavier on the top edge to imply suspension from a track.
The design reads as a patrol source rather than a permanently mounted lamp.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: Reuse the fixed-light SpriteSheetBundle and attach a MovingLight component for rail motion.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load obstacles/obstacle_moving_light_core_6f_32x32.png through AssetServer and reuse the six-frame atlas for patrol sources.
runtime_notes: Motion assumes a 120 px per second rail speed with the sprite centered on the track path.
Bracket shapes should not extend beyond the 32 px logical body in ways that confuse collider alignment.
Pulse timing remains identical to the fixed light so movement, not color, is the distinguishing factor.

context.usage: Rail-mounted light emitter used in advanced floors where the player must read changing shadow windows over time.

shape.silhouette: Fixed-light core silhouette extended with a slim top rail bracket and directional side fins.

acceptance_criteria: Sprite sheet is exactly 192x32 px with six 32x32 frames.
Rail-bracket details read clearly without shifting the visual beam origin away from the sprite center.
The moving source remains immediately distinguishable from the fixed source at gameplay scale.

reference_images.label: gdd_markdown
reference_images.purpose: Grounds puzzle rules, object dimensions, HUD placement, and the Bevy 0.14 technical targets for Umbra Scale.

reference_images.label: moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the twilight art-deco tower mood, silhouette layering, amber beam contrast, and architectural ornament rhythm.

reference_images.purpose: Grounds Umbra silhouette proportions, eye-glow placement, and cloak-like shadow contours for player and echo scale checks.
